He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

topStories.title: TN voter deleted from electoral roll reminds Supreme Court of promise to protect in case of ‘mass exclusion’
topStories.description: The petitioner, C. Geetha, said her name had been a mainstay in the State’s electoral roll over the years; she was even intending to contest as an independent candidate in the 51-Uthangarai (SC) Assembly Constituency and 52-Bargur Assembly Constituency in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections in 2026.

topStories.title: Ceasefire In Lebanon, Release Of Assets: Iran Sets Conditions For Peace Talks
topStories.description: Trump said Washington and Iran had agreed to a two-week ceasefire, though it wasn't clear if Israel's campaign in Lebanon was part of the agreement.

topStories.description: The world was looking towards Islamabad with hope and anticipation, he said, adding that  the people of Kashmir fully comprehend the futility and human cost of war and conflict, having themselves endured decades of grief, loss, and suffering

dailyNews.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

dailyNews.description: US-Iran talks open in Islamabad with mediators focused on keeping dialogue alive amid deep divisions.

dailyNews.title: Was Trump ready to fire Tulsi Gabbard over Iran war testimony? Report claims Roger Stone intervened
dailyNews.description: Trump spoke with his cabinet members and asked he should replace Tulsi Gabbard. Trump was reportedly frustrated over Gabbard shielding one of her former employees who resigned over America's Iran war.

dailyNews.description: Cody Khork died as a captain in the Army Reserve and was posthumously promoted to major, the report added. “He was a hero. I’m so proud of him...,” his mother said in a interview.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump’s 'Dear G' email to Ghislaine Maxwell re-emerges after First Lady denies Epstein links
dailyNews.description: The mail was addressed to ‘Dear G’ and from ‘Love, Melania’. The contents of the letter showed the sender asking the recipient about their frequent travels and their time at Palm Beach, expressing eagerness to visit.

dailyNews.title: McDonald's CEO dragged again after another awkward food video: 'Nugget bite was worse'
dailyNews.description: Chris Kempczinski, CEO of the fast-food chain McDonald's, sparked fresh backlash after a new interview attempting to address his viral Big Arch burger review.

dailyNews.title: Prince Harry sued by charity he founded in honor of Princess Diana: report
dailyNews.description: Prince Harry was sued by Sentebale for libel, according to reports. The former working royal left the charity he co-founded in March 2025 following a dispute.

dailyNews.title: Anti-Israel agitator Mahmoud Khalil one step closer to deportation with immigration board ruling
dailyNews.description: The Board of Immigration Appeals issued a final removal order for Mahmoud Khalil, advancing the Trump administration's push to deport the Columbia graduate student.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump advisor says she's had 'enough' after breaking silence to deny Jeffrey Epstein connection
dailyNews.description: Advisor Marc Beckman says Melania Trump denied ties to Jeffrey Epstein because "enough is enough," calling on the public to focus on her achievements.

dailyNews.title: Cuban president clashes with NBC’s Welker over question about stepping down, presses if she asks same of Trump
dailyNews.description: Cuban leader Miguel Díaz-Canel pushed back when NBC's Kristen Welker asked if he would step down, calling Cuba a free sovereign state not subject to U.S. demands.

dailyNews.title: UFC president Dana White hints at Trump's attendance for upcoming event in Miami
dailyNews.description: Dana White all but confirmed President Donald Trump will attend UFC 327 at Miami's Kaseya Center this Saturday, marking his return to a major sporting event scene.

dailyNews.title: Trump's specific placement of Queen Elizabeth portrait at Mar-a-Lago revealed in new book
dailyNews.description: President Trump has a reproduction of Queen Elizabeth II's last official portrait hanging at Mar-a-Lago, according to a new book about the late monarch.

dailyNews.title: Kamala Harris drops biggest hint yet on 2028 White House run
dailyNews.description: Pete Buttigieg and Kamala Harris headline a cattle call of 2028 Democratic presidential contenders at the National Action Network convention in NYC.

dailyNews.title: Kamala Harris says she might run for president in 2028: "I'm thinking about it"
dailyNews.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris said that she might run for president in 2028, telling a gathering in New York that she is considering mounting a third bid for the White House.

dailyNews.title: Vance heads to Pakistan for Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance is headed to Islamabad, Pakistan, for talks with Iranian officials aimed at ending the war. This comes as President Trump continues to blast Tehran over access to the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi and Imtiaz Tyab report.

dailyNews.title: DOJ argues D.C. pipe bomb defendant not covered by Trump's Jan. 6 pardons
dailyNews.description: The DOJ said in a court filing that the D.C. pipe bomb defendant's case should not be dismissed and that his actions were not covered by Trump's sweeping pardons of the Jan. 6 rioters.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: Trump Posts Graphic Video of Deadly Attack and Rails Against Haitian Immigrants
dailyNews.description: The man seen beating a woman is from Haiti and faces a murder charge in Florida, officials said. President Trump has fought to end protections for Haitian immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Judge Declines to Order Trump Administration to Adjust Somali Deportation Policies
dailyNews.description: Acknowledging that the government may have recently stepped up the pace of removal proceedings, a federal judge wrote that he could not immediately intervene.
